description: Alloy provides identity risk decisioning and onboarding infrastructure for financial institutions and fintechs. Its platform supports entity creation, evaluations, event-driven monitoring, and case-related workflows.
summary: Alloy exposes one documented HTTP API for onboarding, decisioning, entities, events, and related operations; it accepts either HTTP Basic auth with an Alloy-issued token/secret pair or an OAuth 2.0 client-credentials bearer token derived from that same pair.
